hero.title: ROBERT BROWN
hero.subtitle: Mémoire du Sol
hero.description: Modernist forms pressed into raw linen: fractured, softened, and made tactile through fiber, ink, and hand.

image.alt: Close textile crop in warm neutral tones with woven surface texture

fabrics.title: Fall of Rome
fabrics.description: An elegant disarray of classical forms, embodying the mildly subversive beauty of Roman excess.

primary.alt: Wide crop of fragmented neutral linen pattern with charcoal forms

secondary.alt: Close textile detail showing broken motif marks on woven linen

tertiary.alt: Interior vignette with neutral upholstery and abstract textile accents
